query:
-- Day 1: Arrival & Resort Check-in (June 14)
INSERT INTO itinerary_items (tripId, dayNumber, date, time, title, description, location, category, confirmationNumber, notes, sortOrder, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 1, '2026-06-14', '10:30', 'Depart Portland (PDX)', 'Alaska Airlines Flight AS 432 — Portland to Orlando. Nonstop, 5h 20m.', 'Portland International Airport', 'flight', 'AS432-PDX-MCO', 'Check in online 24 hours before. Arrive at airport 2 hours early.', 1, NOW()),
(1, 1, '2026-06-14', '18:50', 'Arrive Orlando (MCO)', 'Land at Orlando International Airport. Disney''s Magical Express will pick you up at Terminal B, Level 1.', 'Orlando International Airport', 'transport', 'MAGIC-EXP-6142026', 'Look for the Disney''s Magical Express signs. Your luggage will be delivered to your room!', 2, NOW()),
(1, 1, '2026-06-14', '20:30', 'Check-in: Polynesian Village Resort', 'Welcome to the magic! Check into your Deluxe Studio at Disney''s Polynesian Village Resort, a South Pacific paradise steps from Magic Kingdom.', 'Disney''s Polynesian Village Resort', 'hotel', 'POLY-RES-2026-0614', 'Your room number will be texted to you. Use the My Disney Experience app to unlock your door with your MagicBand.', 3, NOW()),
(1, 1, '2026-06-14', '21:30', 'Welcome Dinner: Kona Cafe', 'Relax and enjoy your first Disney meal at Kona Cafe, known for their Tonga Toast and Pan-Asian cuisine.', 'Kona Cafe, Polynesian Village Resort', 'dining', 'KONA-RES-614-2130', 'Reservation confirmed for 4. Dress code: resort casual.', 4, NOW());

-- Day 2: Magic Kingdom (June 15)
INSERT INTO itinerary_items (tripId, dayNumber, date, time, title, description, location, category, confirmationNumber, notes, sortOrder, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 2, '2026-06-15', '08:00', 'Early Entry: Magic Kingdom', 'Resort guests get 30 minutes early entry! Head straight to Tomorrowland for Space Mountain before the crowds arrive.', 'Magic Kingdom', 'activity', NULL, 'Wear comfortable shoes. Bring sunscreen and ponchos — afternoon Florida showers are common!', 1, NOW()),
(1, 2, '2026-06-15', '12:30', 'Lunch: Be Our Guest Restaurant', 'Dine in the Beast''s enchanted castle! The French onion soup and grey stuff dessert are must-tries.', 'Be Our Guest Restaurant, Fantasyland', 'dining', 'BOG-RES-615-1230', 'Reservation confirmed. Check in via the My Disney Experience app when you arrive.', 2, NOW()),
(1, 2, '2026-06-15', '14:00', 'Afternoon: Fantasyland & Liberty Square', 'Seven Dwarfs Mine Train (Lightning Lane reserved!), Haunted Mansion, Pirates of the Caribbean.', 'Magic Kingdom', 'activity', 'LL-SDMT-615-1400', 'Lightning Lane reservation for Seven Dwarfs Mine Train at 2:00 PM. Check app for wait times.', 3, NOW()),
(1, 2, '2026-06-15', '21:00', 'Happily Ever After Fireworks', 'The iconic Magic Kingdom fireworks spectacular. Best viewing spot: Main Street USA or the Polynesian beach!', 'Magic Kingdom / Polynesian Beach', 'activity', NULL, 'The Polynesian beach offers a stunning view of the fireworks over the castle without the crowds!', 4, NOW());

-- Day 3: EPCOT (June 16)
INSERT INTO itinerary_items (tripId, dayNumber, date, time, title, description, location, category, confirmationNumber, notes, sortOrder, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 3, '2026-06-16', '09:00', 'EPCOT — World Discovery', 'Start with Guardians of the Galaxy: Cosmic Rewind (virtual queue opens at 7 AM in the app!), then Test Track and Mission: SPACE.', 'EPCOT', 'activity', 'LL-GCR-616-0900', 'Virtual queue for Guardians opens at 7:00 AM sharp. Have the app ready!', 1, NOW()),
(1, 3, '2026-06-16', '12:00', 'Lunch: Space 220 Restaurant', 'Dine 220 miles above Earth with a simulated space view! One of Disney''s most unique dining experiences.', 'Space 220, EPCOT', 'dining', 'S220-RES-616-1200', 'Reservation confirmed. Arrive 15 minutes early. The elevator "launch" experience is part of the fun!', 2, NOW()),
(1, 3, '2026-06-16', '14:00', 'World Showcase Exploration', 'Explore 11 countries around the World Showcase lagoon. Don''t miss the Frozen Ever After ride in Norway!', 'EPCOT World Showcase', 'activity', NULL, 'Try the school bread in Norway and the cinnamon rolls in Germany. Passport books available for kids!', 3, NOW()),
(1, 3, '2026-06-16', '21:00', 'EPCOT Forever Nighttime Spectacular', 'Fireworks, lasers, and music over World Showcase Lagoon. Best viewing: near the International Gateway.', 'EPCOT World Showcase Lagoon', 'activity', NULL, 'Grab a spot 30 minutes early near the France pavilion for the best view.', 4, NOW());

-- Day 4: Hollywood Studios (June 17)
INSERT INTO itinerary_items (tripId, dayNumber, date, time, title, description, location, category, confirmationNumber, notes, sortOrder, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 4, '2026-06-17', '08:00', 'Early Entry: Hollywood Studios', 'Head straight to Galaxy''s Edge for Rise of the Resistance (virtual queue) and Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run.', 'Disney''s Hollywood Studios', 'activity', 'LL-ROTR-617-0800', 'Rise of the Resistance virtual queue opens at park open. Have the app ready at 8:00 AM!', 1, NOW()),
(1, 4, '2026-06-17', '11:00', 'Slinky Dog Dash & Toy Story Land', 'Slinky Dog Dash, Alien Swirling Saucers, and Toy Story Mania. Great for the whole family!', 'Toy Story Land, Hollywood Studios', 'activity', 'LL-SDD-617-1100', 'Lightning Lane for Slinky Dog Dash at 11:00 AM.', 2, NOW()),
(1, 4, '2026-06-17', '13:00', 'Lunch: Sci-Fi Dine-In Theater', 'Eat in vintage cars at a drive-in movie theater showing classic sci-fi clips. A Hollywood Studios classic!', 'Sci-Fi Dine-In Theater, Hollywood Studios', 'dining', 'SCIFI-RES-617-1300', 'Reservation confirmed for 4. The milkshakes are legendary!', 3, NOW()),
(1, 4, '2026-06-17', '19:30', 'Fantasmic! Nighttime Show', 'Mickey''s dream comes to life in this spectacular outdoor show with water screens, fireworks, and Disney villains.', 'Hollywood Studios Amphitheater', 'activity', 'FAN-617-1930', 'Dining package includes reserved seating. Arrive 20 minutes before showtime.', 4, NOW());
